# Dependency Notes

Version pins, upgrade blockers, and compatibility constraints.
Auto-captured when implementation or debugging reveals version-sensitive behavior.

<!-- Format per entry: -->
<!-- ### [package-name] -->
<!-- **Pinned to**: vX.Y.Z -->
<!-- **Reason**: [why we can't upgrade or why this version matters] -->
<!-- **Blocked by**: [what needs to change before upgrading] -->
<!-- **Discovered**: [date] - [context: debug session, upgrade attempt, etc.] -->
